title: Setup, including time tracking for project invoicing and payroll
excerpt:
Hi y’all! 
We’re a personal assistant/house manager service getting started with Monday. We have some pretty specific needs surrounding time tracking for both payroll and client invoicing, and integration into Quickbooks…

posts.author: HeatherQoTD (Heather Snaman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi y’all!

We’re a personal assistant/house manager service getting started with Monday. We have some pretty specific needs surrounding time tracking for both payroll and client invoicing, and integration into Quickbooks.

We’d love to find an expert to help us get set up and started on the right foot. Does anybody have experience in this specific area?

Thanks!

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @HeatherQoTD

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements.

Please feel free to return my email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: We have experience in this area and we would love to speak with you about your needs. We have availability for an intro call next week. Please send an email to jenna@iointegration.com if you would like to discuss how we can work together going forward.
